{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Forged razor
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|A [[Forged razor]] is a technique used to crystallize power, though it may shatter like glass.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c1">''Soulsmith'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
